description_long: This is a cylindrical black bottle with a dropper cap, designed for dispensing liquid products. The front label displays the brand 'yourzooki' and identifies the contents as CBD Oil infused with terpenes, specifying a concentration of 40,000mg CBD and a volume of 100ml. The bottle features a gold band near the base, adding a touch of elegance to the otherwise minimalist design. The back of the bottle includes a white supplement facts label, providing detailed product information. The dropper cap is glossy and black, with a bulbous top for easy gripping and dispensing. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, suitable for personal care or wellness use in an urban environment.
description: A sleek black cylindrical bottle with a gold band, dropper cap, and detailed front and back labels for CBD Oil.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'yourzooki' brand, CBD Oil product name, gold band, and dosage details.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the transition from the front label to the supplement facts label on the back.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the white supplement facts label and the gold band encircling the base.
description_view_3: Side view showing mostly the plain black surface with a partial glimpse of the supplement facts label and gold band.
